reasons: Chip can turn Nolan's first dive pressure into a full team collapse.
Nolan can start the target pressure, then Chip brings follow-up through Shortcut.

proof.summary: Nolan starts the pickoff, while Chip lets teammates join quickly through portals.
worksBestWhen: Nolan identifies the target before Chip opens Shortcut.
The team enters after Nolan has forced enemy movement.
failureCases: Chip opens the portal into a losing fight.
The enemy waits near the portal with counter-engage.

reasons: Angela can attach to Nolan and protect him while he dives.
Nolan often enters deep positions, so attached protection is easier to apply than normal backline support.

proof.summary: Angela gives Nolan extra safety during his burst-dive window.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Nolan spends his escape route.
Nolan chooses a target that can be finished during the protection window.
failureCases: Nolan dives into layered crowd control.
Nolan overextends after the shield window ends.

reasons: Kaja's suppression gives Nolan a reliable target to burst.
Nolan's Rift combo becomes easier when the target cannot freely dash away.

proof.summary: Kaja locks one target first, then Nolan follows with fast burst.
worksBestWhen: Kaja suppresses a core or backline damage dealer.
Nolan waits for the confirmed lock before committing.
failureCases: Nolan is too far to follow.
Enemy peel punishes Nolan after the pick attempt.

reasons: Floryn can heal Nolan even when he dives away from her position.
Nolan benefits from global sustain because his pickoff pattern often separates him from normal support range.

proof.summary: Floryn gives Nolan global sustain support during dive or escape windows.
worksBestWhen: Floryn uses Bloom before Nolan is already too low.
Nolan keeps one mobility tool to escape after being healed.
failureCases: Nolan is burst before healing applies.
Enemy control prevents Nolan from resetting.

reasons: Mathilda gives Nolan another movement option for entry or exit.
Her shield and mobility support reduce Nolan's risk after he spends Rift mobility.

proof.summary: Mathilda helps Nolan reposition after his burst attempt.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda stays close enough to Nolan's fight path.
Nolan saves one movement option for after the burst.
failureCases: Enemy crowd control blocks the retreat.
Mathilda is forced to use support tools before Nolan commits.
